item.title: HTML and CSS only tabs
item.description: Basic shortcodes The following content: {{< tabgroup >}} {{< tab name="Hello" >}} Hello World! {{< /tab >}} {{< tab name="Goodbye" >}} Goodbye Everybody! {{< /tab >}} {{< /tabgroup >}} Will generate: Hello Hello World! Goodbye Goodbye Everybody! Right alighment You can also align the tabs to the right: {{< tabgroup align="right" >}} {{< tab name="Hello" >}} Hello World! {{< /tab >}} {{< tab name="Goodbye" >}} Goodbye Everybody! {{< /tab >}} {{< /tabgroup >}} Giving you this look:

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Rich Content
item.description: Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.

item.title: Placeholder Text
item.description: Lorem est tota propiore conpellat pectoribus de pectora summo.

item.title: Math Typesetting
item.description: Mathematical notation in a Hugo project can be enabled by using third party JavaScript libraries.

item.title: Emoji Support
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.

item.title: About
item.description: Hi! 👋 Welcome to my to my website, powered by Hugo, and written in GO. Massive shoutout to Luiz F. A. de Prá for making this amazing theme, called Coder. So, as you might tell, my name is Jonas Skånøy. I reside in Norway, and currently am doing a bachelor course in philosophy a undisclosed university (I won’t doxs myself lol). Before that however, I was an apprentice as a Computer & Electronics technician.

item.title: Contact info
item.description: ☎️ Digital Contact Information I’m not on Telegram, Twitter or Reddit. So email and github will have to do. Email: jonas@e.email Github: jonasskanoy 📕 Rules Don’t contact me about gossip or political opinions, should go without saying these days. Don’t contact me asking me to shill your product unless it is all free software. I am not really a hardcore tech consumer.
